# superdo

Production-ready task management for distributed teams. Enterprise-scale,
zero-config, and built for the modern asynchronous workplace.

## Features

Powerful, comprehensive, enterprise-grade task management with everything
your team needs to ship faster. Battle-tested at scale.

## Capabilities

- Multi-tenant support
- Realtime sync across all devices
- Audit log with immutable history
- Role-based access control
- End-to-end encryption

## Supported Integrations

Slack, Microsoft Teams, Email, SMS, Webhooks, Zapier, IFTTT, GitHub,
GitLab, Jira, Linear, Notion, Asana, Trello.

## Web Interface

Modern React-based dashboard with dark mode, keyboard shortcuts, and
offline-first PWA support.

## CLI Tool

Full-featured command-line client with shell completions for bash, zsh,
and fish.

## Plugin Extensions

Extensible via Python plugins. Hot-reloadable. Sandboxed execution.
Marketplace coming soon.

## API

REST + GraphQL with OAuth2, API keys, and webhook signing. Rate-limited
per-tenant. SDK in TypeScript, Python, Go, and Rust.

## Server Deployment

Self-host on Kubernetes, Docker Swarm, or bare metal. Helm charts provided.

## Client Libraries

Official clients for every major language. Community clients for the rest.
